title: lxh
text:
My name is Xiaohan, I am a second-year Biostatistics PhD student at the University of Pennsylvania. My interests lie broadly in causal inference, particularly in methods that require as few assumptions on the data generating mechanism as possible. Before joining the PhD program, I obtained my BS in Statistics and Data Science from Carnegie Mellon University where I was fortunate to have received a wonderful undergraduate statistics education.
For chats about research and potential collaborations, music, or books, feel free to reach out at liuxh[at]upenn[dot]edu!


Education

PhD in Biostatistics
The University of Pennsylvania, Expected 2029
BS in Statistics and Data Science (Mathematical Sciences Track)
Carnegie Mellon University, May 2024



I took inspiration for this website from others!

title: Music
text:
I played flute in my middle school band, high school marching band, wind ensemble, full orchestra, TMEA Region Band, Orchestra, and All-State Band. During my years at CMU, I was lucky to continue playing as part of the All-University Orchestra.
I primarily enjoy middle to late romantic, impressionist, and modern composers. Some of my favorite composers are Jean Sibelius, The Mighty Five, Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, Sergei Rachmaninoff, and Maurice Ravel. Recently, I have been interested in Richard Strauss’ An Alpine Symphony and Gustav Mahler’s epic Symphonies No. 1, 2, and 3. I also enjoy listening to piano concertos and Studio Ghibli soundtracks.

title: Apples
text: I am an apple connoisseur. Here is a complete ranking of varieties I have tried.

title: Apples
text:
S-Tier
Pazazz - Very similar to Honeycrisp but much juicier. The texture is too watery for me but the flavor is nice, similar to a pear and pineapple
Evercrisp - Texture is good but honestly too sweet and not much flavor
Cinnamon Spice - Wonderful, spciy flavor.
Jonagold - Sweet but well rounded flavor, very juicy, texture could be crunchier, reminiscent of Macintosh, flavor is really nice! (A tier)
Crimson Topaz - Tart! Juicy, cider-y taste, very beautiful flesh, pink/salmon colored (S-tier)
Ludicrisp - very juicy, slightly tart but overall sweet, nice texture but could be harder (A-tier)
Crimson crisp - nothing special, very good texture solid apple flavor
